categoryDescription: Free online tool to calculate percentage decrease between the original value and the new lower value, with full step-by-step working.
formula: Percentage Decrease = ((Original Value - New Value) / Original Value) x 100
formulaDescription: Subtract the new value from the original value, divide by the original value, and multiply by 100. That gives you the percentage decrease.

messages.empty: Enter both values (original must be greater than 0) to calculate percentage decrease.
